$source: Figma — Mr UK / Templates / 'Home page' section (id 707917:1945). Extracted 2026-05-08.
$note: Canonical design tokens. Per-tenant overrides live in tenant.branding (colors, fonts only). The type scale and gradients are brand-system level and rarely change per tenant.

type.$comment: px values pulled directly from Figma. lineHeight in px. Mapped to logical roles, not 1:1 to HTML tags — the same role can render as h1/h2/etc. depending on document outline.

subhead.example: Take care of your kitchen with modern appliances

ctaLg.example: Learn more / View all kitchen appliances

bodyLg.example: Superior performance you can rely on

body.example: Get fresh market updates and exclusive offers

small.example: By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy

elevation.$comment: Zero drop-shadows in the Home page section. Depth is conveyed via surface tint differences (#FFFFFF / #F5F5F7 / #F9F9F9), not elevation. Re-extract from Product / PDP sections if shadows are needed there.

layout.$comment: Designs are at 1512px viewport (MacBook Pro 14"). Hero is full-bleed 1512x740. Navbar is 1512x64. Treat 1512 as the design reference width and scale up/down responsively.
